texto: Although generally our sight diminishes with age; I submit that our vision improves. The older we get, the more clearly we see our life’s decisions played out to their logical conclusions.
explicacao: Citação de David C. Maloney sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Although generally our sight diminishes with age; I submit that our vision improves. The older we…” articula sabedoria, aging, although em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como sabedoria.
